text:
(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), the department by rule may adopt any requirement that:

(1) relates to the safe packing or transportation of hazardous materials; and

(2) is consistent with Chapter 51 (Texas Coastal Waterway Act) , Title 49, United States Code, or regulations adopted under that law.

(b) The department may not adopt a requirement for the transportation of hazardous materials by vessel or by aircraft.

(c) The department may adopt any administrative rules necessary to implement this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 193. Hazardous Materials
##### § 193.001 — Hazardous Materials; Packing and Transportation

(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), the department by rule may adopt any requirement that:

    (1) relates to the safe packing or transportation of hazardous materials; and

    (2) is consistent with Chapter 51 (Texas Coastal Waterway Act) , Title 49, United States Code, or regulations adopted under that law.

(b) The department may not adopt a requirement for the transportation of hazardous materials by vessel or by aircraft.

(c) The department may adopt any administrative rules necessary to implement this section.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 91 (S.B.1303), Sec. 24.101, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a

relates to the safe packing or transportation of hazardous materials; and
is consistent with Chapter 51 (Texas Coastal Waterway Act) , Title 49, United States Code, or regulations adopted under that law.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department may not adopt a requirement for the transportation of hazardous materials by vessel or by aircraft.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: The department may adopt any administrative rules necessary to implement this section.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 91 (S.B.1303), Sec. 24.101, eff. September 1, 2011.
